_meta.voice: Direct American English. Indie-publisher voice: clean, aesthetic-aware, focused on craft + commerce.

strings.Glimmer — e-commerce сайт для українсько: Glimmer — e-commerce site for a Ukrainian publisher of aesthetic boo
Glimmer — e-commerce site for a Ukrainian publisher of aesthetic books
strings.Glimmer — нове українське видавництво, я: Glimmer is a new Ukrainian publisher that puts out aesthetic fiction: literary novels, fantasy, thrillers, mysteries. We built a full e-commerce site with a conversion-driven marketing structure — catalog, product cards, pre-orders, deal blocks, and a short path to checkout. After launch the site started moving books fast: the client recouped the site investment in roughly 1 week.
strings.~1 тиждень до окупності після запуску ·: ~1 week to payback after launch · 3 commercial blocks on the homepage: bestsellers, deals, new releases · 4+ catalog categories: literary, fantasy, thrillers, mysteries · 0 extra steps from banner to purchase
strings.Бренду потрібен був сайт, який одразу пе: The brand needed a site that conveys the publisher's aesthetic and sells from day one
strings.Важливо було не просто показати книги, а: Beyond showing the books, we needed a structure that leads to the sale
strings.Винесли Telegram і Instagram як додатков: Pulled Telegram and Instagram out as secondary channels for talking to the brand's audience
strings.Головна задача — створити e-commerce інс: The core task — build an e-commerce tool that starts moving books the moment it launches
strings.Додали механіку передзамовлень — сайт пі: Added pre-order mechanics — the site supports new-book launches before stock arrives
strings.Зробили візуальну подачу, яка відповідає: Built a visual presentation that fits the brand's aesthetic: clean cards, covers front and center
strings.Користувач має швидко перейти від банера: The user should jump from a banner or curated list straight to a specific book and checkout
strings.Оформили карточки товарів із ціною, зниж: Built product cards with price, discount, and status: "Buy" or "Pre-order"
strings.Побудували головну сторінку як продаючу: Built the homepage as a sales structure: banners with CTAs, bestsellers, deals, new releases
strings.Потрібні були окремі блоки для просуванн: We needed dedicated blocks to push priority titles: bestsellers, new releases, deals
strings.Підключили Sanity CMS — команда видавниц: Wired up Sanity CMS — the publishing team runs the catalog, banners, and curated lists themselves
strings.Реалізували акційні позначки та блоки зн: Built deal badges and discount blocks for promoting priority titles
strings.Реалізували ротацію банерів на першому е: Built homepage banner rotation to promote new and priority books
strings.Розробили e-commerce сайт для українсько: Built an e-commerce site for a Ukrainian publisher from scratch
strings.Сайт мав підтримувати передзамовлення, а: The site had to support pre-orders, deals, and frequent catalog updates
strings.Створили каталог із категоріями: романи,: Built the catalog with categories: literary, fantasy, thrillers, mysteries
strings.зайвих кроків від банера до покупки: extra steps from banner to purchase
strings.категорії каталогу: романи, фентезі, три: catalog categories: literary, fantasy, thrillers, mysteries
strings.комерційні блоки на головній: топ-продаж: commercial blocks on the homepage: bestsellers, deals, new releases

sections[_key==\"sec9\"].image.alt.en: Glimmer's new homepage with banners, bestsellers, and catalog

sections[_key==\"sec6\"].bodyEn: Glimmer is a publisher with a new book line and a social-media audience that needed a real place to buy. Without a full e-commerce site, audience interest wasn't converting into orders — the catalog, structure, and pre-order mechanics were all missing.
sections[_key==\"sec9\"].bodyEn: We built an e-commerce site on Next.js + Sanity CMS with a conversion-driven marketing structure. Every block on the homepage solves a commercial job — not just showing books, but pushing specific titles and walking the user toward checkout.
sections[_key==\"sech\"].bodyEn: After launch the site immediately started working as a sales channel. The right marketing structure on the homepage — banners, curated lists, deals, new releases — converted the audience's existing interest into real orders. The client recouped the site investment in roughly 1 week after launch — that's the headline result of this case.
